text:
There once was a young dog named Benny who lived for adventures. Benny would chase his tail all day dreaming about exciting things he would do tomorrow. He lived happily ever after in a big sunny house in the country.

Once upon a time, Benny wished he could fly like a bird. Every evening he'd sit on the fence watching the birds with big, hopeful eyes. One day, while lazily flapping his wings, Benny spotted a bird with wings that looked just like his.

The bird swooped down and introduced himself as Airwing. Benny instantly felt like he'd found a brand-new best friend. Airwing didn't just flap his wings; he could glide gracefully through the air. They became inseparable. Benny would chase rainbows, and Airwing would follow. They visited the pond, climbed the trees, and explored every nook of the countryside.

Years passed. Benny grew old and his wings slowed; Airwing never lost his keen agility. They embarked on countless trips. One
